title: 9 Pieces Mini Silicone Spatula-Makeup Spatula-Small Silicone Spatula-Thin Spatula Set for Skinny Openings-Abnaok Tiny Scraper for Jar,Kitchen Bottles,Cosmetic
description:
About this item
No Waste of Anything -- The makeup silicone spatula has a long enough body and narrow head for reaching food in jars and other tnarrow spaces,even for bottle with slight opening,you will not waste.
Safe Materia -- Mini jar scraper are made of quality silicone material,can be reused and has good toughness,safe and non-toxic,easily bypass the corners of the container,very convenient.
Easy to clean -- Silicone spatula for makeup adopts one-piece molding design,no crevices and easy to clean, save your time,you can carry them for travel,home use,bring convenience to your life.
Wide Application -- Our small silicone spatulas can also be applied for cosmetics, hand body lotion,facial mask,lip gloss,mud mask,peanut butter, ketchup and other every day items.
What you will get : 1 set including 9 pieces: 3*Small Spatula 6.1*0.3" (15.5*0.8cm) , 3*Medium Spatula 9.25*0.4" (23.5*1cm), and 3*Large Spatula 12*0.6" (30.5*1.5cm). Different sizes to meet your different needs.
reviews_5s: Love the 3 sizes. Have already used mine several times. Good quality and design.Most tools are hand substitutes and you can squeak by without if you don’t mind messy hands. These go beyond and reach places fingers cannot. The silicon is greatThis set is perfect to use on skin care bottles and jars when the pump stops working near the bottom of the bottle. There can be a week or more worth of product left in the containers. The multiple sizes make it convenient for whatever size container you have.These are awesome. I use them to scrape out my makeup bottlesNice variety of sizes for stocking stuffers for the women in my familyMy sister gave me a brand-name like this that she saw on a TV show. I kept losing it. So then I found this pack of several sizes. It’s perfect for make up, around the kitchen, or any place you may need to get something out of the jar that you just can’t get out any other way I bought them for some of my friends and plan on giving them out to everyone on my Christmas list. Everyone should have these.I had 3 different sizes of these & have loved/utilized each one a LOT. All I've given them to have told me how much they'd used them!I kept one set for me and gave others sets to my kids. Nice and long and well suited to get to the bottom of the jar. Different lengths and sizes to accommodate jars.Great to have a tiny spatula that fits into small bottle openings. I used it for makeup, to get all that expensive product out of the jars. And I have a second set for the kitchen - love it for the specialty mustards and condiments. Sure beats shaking the jars until a little appears! Love this one!I wish I had found these little gadgets a long time ago. I use them for everything. They are great for getting food stuff from the bottom of jars so not as much is wasted.
reviews_1s: way too flimsy to be of much use. Spoon ends have no support to them. returned for refundI’ve bought various brands of silicon ware and this brand by far is my least favorite. They’re barely firm enough to stir liquid let alone trying to stir semi-liquid creams and gels. I do not recommend.Spatula end works but the spoon end is useless because it doesn't have the rigid inner core. Should have looked at the photos of other people here!The spoon and spatula sides were too flimsy to scrape anything, don’t waste your money.The spoon end is so flimsy that I can't scoop anything with it. The rod in all of these don't reach the spoon end making them useless. Don't bother!The center piece is sturdy, but the ends are flimsy and would not scrape out anything of substance.Noe gustaron son muy blandas.Ineffective
